content:
# Sedimentary Architecture

**Summary**: The spatial arrangement of sedimentary bodies and their internal geometry.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] analyzed the depositional architecture of the Al Wajh Formation.

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] investigated the sequence architecture of the Marrat Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] Understanding the impact of sediment transport and energy on reservoir shape.

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] investigated the sequence architecture of the Marrat Formation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] Analyzed via sedimentary logs and outcrop mapping.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified sheet-like reservoir geometries in medial regions due to high-energy flooding events. ([[2023-butt|Butt, 2023, p. 104]])

- The study aimed to predict sequence architecture at the third stratigraphic order. ([[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024, p. 43]])
